PostToolUse.command: if [[ "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == *.rb || "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == *.rake ]]; then STREE_CMD='stree'; if command -v bundle &>/dev/null && bundle exec stree version &>/dev/null; then STREE_CMD='bundle exec stree'; elif ! command -v stree &>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; STREE_ARGS='write'; if [[ -f .streerc ]]; then STREE_ARGS="write --config .streerc"; fi; $STREE_CMD $STREE_ARGS "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; fi
